network.title: Wrong network
network.body: Your wallet is connected to {current}. GrowFi is currently running on {expected}.
network.switchError: Could not switch automatically. Open your wallet and add {chain} manually.

feed.title: Community Feed
feed.subtitle: Every onchain action across every campaign — live.

activity.title: Activity
activity.empty: No activity yet. Be the first to back a campaign.

home.subtitle: Agricultural crowdfunding on the blockchain. Buy fractions of trees, earn seasonal yield, redeem real products.
home.demoNotice: Demo mode — factory not yet deployed
home.emptyBody: Be the first grower to launch a regenerative campaign on GrowFi.

step1.title: Campaign Info
step1.subtitle: Describe your agricultural project to attract investors.
step1.name: Campaign Name
step1.yieldNameHint: Name of the reward token stakers earn (e.g. "Olive Oil")
step1.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your campaign, the territory, the production...
step1.imageDrop: Drag image here or click to upload
step1.imageHint: PNG, JPG up to 5MB. Recommended ratio 16:9.
step1.dmrvProjectIdHint: Optional. Link a Silvi Protocol project to show public project evidence on the campaign page.

step2.title: Tokenomics Parameters
step2.subtitle: Define price, caps, deadlines and season duration.
step2.minProductHint: Minimum units for physical pickup (e.g. liters)
step2.expectedAnnualHarvestUsdHint: USD value the grower commits to deliver each year (e.g. 5000 = $5,000/yr)
step2.expectedAnnualHarvestQtyHint: Physical quantity per year (e.g. 250 {unit}/yr — sets implied $/unit when paired with the USD value above)
step2.firstHarvestYearHint: Calendar year when the first harvest is reported (e.g. 2027)
step2.coverageHarvestsHint: Number of harvests you pre-fund as a guarantee. Payback ≈ {payback} harvests at this yield.

step3.title: Accepted Tokens
step3.subtitle: Pick the payment tokens investors can use. For each token, you'll sign a separate transaction after the main deploy.
step3.fixedRateHint: How many {symbol} per 1 campaign token. Example: 0.144 means 1 token = 0.144 {symbol}.
step3.noFeedOnChain: No feed configured for this chain
step3.signatureNotice: You'll sign 1 transaction per token right after the deploy. Tokens can also be added later from the campaign detail page.
step3.routingSubtitle: Primary-sale proceeds go to the campaign owner by default. Add a project partner receiver to split the owner proceeds after protocol fees.
step3.splitEnabled: Split campaign proceeds with a project partner
step3.splitEnabledHint: The project partner receives the percentage below. The campaign owner receives the remainder.
step3.splitInvalidAddress: Enter a valid non-zero Ethereum address.
step3.splitInvalidBps: Enter a percentage greater than 0 and up to 100.
step3.directIssueEnabled: Enable direct issue module after deploy
step3.directIssueEnabledHint: Allows the campaign owner to mint campaign tokens later for off-chain agreements.

step4.title: Lock Collateral
step4.subtitle: Optional. Lock USDC right after deploy as a yield-coverage signal for investors. You can skip and add it later from the campaign manage panel.
step4.overBalance: Over wallet balance — capped at {amount} USDC.
step4.amountHint: Recommended: {recommended} (= ${annual}/yr × {coverage} harvests). Set to 0 to skip.
step4.amountHintNoCoverage: You committed 0 covered harvests in step 2 — no collateral is required. You can still lock some as a goodwill signal.
step4.skipNote: Skipping is fine — investors will see the campaign without collateral signal until you lock from the manage tab.
step4.extraSignatures: Locking now adds 2 wallet signatures after deploy: approve USDC + lockCollateral.

step5.title: Confirm and Deploy
step5.subtitle: Verify the parameters before deploying the campaign.
step5.notice: Sign from your connected wallet when prompted.

status.errorFactory: CampaignFactory not yet deployed. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_FACTORY_ADDRESS.
status.errorInsufficientBalance: Not enough USDC in your wallet to lock {required} USDC of collateral (you have {actual}). Lower the collateral amount on step 5, or skip the lock and add it later from the campaign manage tab.
status.errorDuplicateName: A campaign called "{name}" already exists. Pick a different name on step 1 — duplicates make the discovery list confusing.
status.collateralApproveSig: Sign USDC approval for collateral lock…
status.errorProceedsSplitImpl: Proceeds split implementation is not configured for this chain.
status.errorDirectIssueImpl: Direct issue implementation is not configured for this chain.

success.title: Campaign live on-chain
success.body: {name} is deployed and ready to receive its first investors.

preview.title: Preview
preview.emptyDescription: Your project description will appear here.
preview.hint: Preview updates in real time as you fill out the form.

buy.title: Buy Tokens
buy.subtitle: Select payment token and amount
buy.mintHint: Testnet faucet — mints 10,000 test USDC to your wallet
buy.maxCapReachedHint: The hard cap has been reached — no more tokens can be minted.
buy.clampedToCap: Capped at {tokens} ${tokenSymbol} — only {payment} {paymentSymbol} will be charged, the rest stays in your wallet.
buy.feeBreakdownHint: The fee is kept by the protocol and is not refunded if the campaign fails.

expectedReturn.title: Expected return
expectedReturn.perpetualNote: Every harvest after payback is pure profit — the campaign is a perpetual income stream, not a fixed-term bond.

buy.notBuyable: Campaign not buyable in this state
buy.escrow: Funds held in escrow until campaign activation
buy.escrowFunding: Funds held in escrow until the min cap is reached. Refundable if the campaign fails.
buy.escrowActive: Campaign is active — payments go directly to the grower.

investors.title: Investors
investors.emptyBody: Be the first to buy into this campaign — your wallet will appear here.

linkMetadata.title: Link metadata to this campaign
linkMetadata.body: On-chain this campaign is still "{name}" — upload the cover image and fill in the basic info, then sign one transaction to make it public.

collateralMissing.title: Collateral commitment not yet funded
collateralMissing.body: You committed {coverage} pre-funded harvests. Locked: {locked} of {required} required ({missing} still missing). Lock now to back the yield-coverage signal investors see on the campaign page.

stake.title: Your Positions
stake.subtitle: Stake $CAMPAIGN to earn seasonal $YIELD.
stake.noActiveSeasonHint: Staking is disabled until the grower starts a new season.
stake.noPositions: You have no active positions on this campaign.
stake.stakersEmpty: No active stakers on this campaign yet.
stake.activePositions: {count, plural, one {# active position} other {# active positions}}

activateCta.title: Min cap reached — ready to activate
activateCta.body: The on-chain minimum has been reached. Any connected wallet can activate the campaign and release the funding escrow.

sellBack.title: Sell-back queue
sellBack.subtitle: Queue your $CAMPAIGN to be bought out by the next investors. Fills happen first-in-first-out as new buys land.
sellBack.tooManyOrders: You have the maximum {max} open sell-back orders. Cancel some before queueing more.
sellBack.note: Filled amounts get your original payment token back. Unfilled orders can be cancelled any time — tokens return to your wallet.

repayment.title: Producer-funded repayment
repayment.subtitle: This campaign has a repayment pool. Holders can burn free ${symbol} for USDC while the pool has liquidity.
repayment.idleHint: Enter an amount to preview the USDC payout.
repayment.connectHint: Connect wallet to check your balance and redeem.
repayment.stakedHint: Only free wallet balance can be redeemed here. Unstake first if your tokens are currently staked.

ecommerce.title: Shop this harvest
ecommerce.subtitle: Buy physical products from the grower with USDC. Each order is committed on-chain and linked to a private fulfillment record.
ecommerce.emptyCatalog: The grower has not published a shop catalog yet.
ecommerce.cartEmptyHint: Add products to reserve them from this campaign.
ecommerce.name: Full name
ecommerce.checkoutSubtitle: Enter the receipt and delivery details before confirming the on-chain order.
ecommerce.checkoutNote: Multi-product carts are settled as one approval on the total and one wallet confirmation per product line.
ecommerce.inactiveCampaign: Shop opens when campaign is active
ecommerce.emailPending: Order confirmed. Receipt email is pending.
ecommerce.defaultProductDescription: Product reserved from the campaign shop.

updates.title: Project updates
updates.subtitle: On-chain updates from the grower, with off-chain rich media and wallet-signed reactions.
updates.metadataMissing: Update metadata is not available yet.

productiveAsset.title: Grower commitment
productiveAsset.prefunded: The grower pre-funded harvests {start}–{end} with USDC collateral.
productiveAsset.tailRisk: The tail of {count, plural, one {# year} other {# years}} ({start}–{end}) carries normal delivery risk.
productiveAsset.noPrefund: The grower published targets but did not pre-fund any harvest. Holders carry the full delivery risk.

refund.title: Campaign failed — claim refund
refund.subtitle: Min cap wasn't reached before the deadline. You can burn your $CAMPAIGN for the original payment back, per-token.
refund.connectFirst: Connect your wallet to see your refundable amount.
refund.nothingToRefund: No refundable purchases found for this wallet on this campaign.
refund.refundNote: The refund burns your proportional $CAMPAIGN and returns the original payment for that token. Call once per payment token used.
refund.triggerBody: Funding period ended below the min cap. Click to flip the campaign to Buyback state so investors can claim refunds.

harvest.title: Redeem Harvest
harvest.subtitle: Choose how to receive your $YIELD.
harvest.noSeasons: No seasons on this campaign yet.
harvest.noReportedYet: No harvests reported yet. When the grower reports a season, it shows up here.
harvest.claimWindowClosed: Claim window for this season is closed.
harvest.productRedemptionSoon: Physical product redemption (Merkle proof) coming soon.
harvest.notEligibleForProduct: Not eligible for product redemption this season (below min claim, or not in the snapshot).
harvest.productRedeemNote: Redeeming burns your full $YIELD balance for this season. You'll receive the product after off-chain shipping coordination.
harvest.productClaimed: Product redemption committed — waiting for off-chain shipping.
harvest.awaitingReportHint: The grower hasn't reported the harvest for this season yet. Your $YIELD will be redeemable once they do.
harvest.awaitingReportEnded: Season ended {date}. Grower hasn't reported the harvest yet.

timeline.claimAfterWindow: USDC claims open after the redemption choice window closes.
timeline.shortfall: Deposit window closed with the pool under-funded. You can still claim your pro-rata of what was deposited.
timeline.restructureBody: Convert the unpaid USDC shortfall into newly minted Campaign Tokens.
timeline.claimAvailableFirst: Claim the available USDC first, then convert the remaining unpaid amount.
timeline.restructureWaiting: The module is active. Conversion unlocks after available USDC and collateral are exhausted.

info.title: Campaign Info
info.about: Descriptive metadata is not available yet. Economic parameters and campaign state are read from the contracts and the public index.
info.tokens: Campaign Tokens represent the tokenized share of this campaign. Price, caps, supply, and state are verifiable on-chain.
info.dmrvBody: Satellite monitoring and field evidence are served by the Silvi bridge. Loading can take a while because the map aggregates live tree and field data.
info.dmrvLoadingHint: Silvi project data is fetched live and can take a few seconds.

silvi.title: Project #{projectId}
silvi.body: Satellite monitoring and field evidence are served by the Silvi bridge. Loading can take a while because the map aggregates live tree and field data.
silvi.loadingHint: Silvi project data is fetched live and can take a few seconds.

manage.title: Grower management
manage.subtitle: Drive the campaign lifecycle, report harvests, and settle USDC obligations to holders.

actions.activateHint: Move Funding → Active once the min cap is reached.
actions.activateBlocked: Waiting for min cap: {current} / {min} $CAMPAIGN ({progress}%). The button unlocks once buyers push supply past the min cap.
actions.startSeasonHint: Open a new staking season so holders can accrue $YIELD.
actions.endSeasonHintEarly: Ending early is allowed but holders get less $YIELD accrual.
actions.endSeasonHintReady: Season duration elapsed — ready to close and report harvest.
actions.endCampaignHint: Permanently closes the campaign. No more staking or harvests.

report.title: Report harvest
report.subtitle: Snapshot holders, generate a Merkle root for product redemption, and lock the season results on-chain.
report.totalValueUSDHint: Gross sales value of the harvest. The 2% protocol fee is deducted on-chain.
report.totalProductUnitsHint: e.g. liters of oil available for redemption.

errors.valueRequired: Enter the total harvest value in USD.
errors.unitsRequired: Enter the total product units to distribute.
errors.noHolders: No active $YIELD holders found for this season.

projectInfo.subtitle: Edit the public project metadata shown on the campaign page. Saving uploads a new metadata file and links it on-chain.
projectInfo.name: Project name
projectInfo.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the project, terms and links...

parameters.subtitle: Tune the campaign after launch. Each change is a separate on-chain tx with grower-only guard-rails (deadline extend-only, caps stay ≥ committed supply).
parameters.deadlineHint: Funding-only. The new date must be later than the current one.
parameters.deadlineDisabledHint: Campaign already {state}: the funding deadline is editable only during Funding.
parameters.minCapHint: Funding-only. Must stay above currentSupply ({supply}) and ≤ maxCap.
parameters.minCapDisabledHint: Campaign already {state}: min cap is editable only during Funding.
parameters.maxCapHint: Funding or Active. Must stay ≥ currentSupply ({supply}) + outstanding sell-back queue.
parameters.maxCapDisabledHint: Campaign in {state}: max cap is editable only during Funding or Active.
parameters.commitmentSubtitle: Update the annual value and product quantity used to calculate the public price per unit.
parameters.annualHarvestUsdHint: Total USD value committed for one harvest year.
parameters.annualHarvestQuantityHint: Number of physical product units committed per year.
parameters.impliedUnitPriceHint: Annual value divided by annual product quantity.
parameters.commitmentModuleUpgradeRequired: This campaign needs the latest Collateral module before these values can be changed.
parameters.commitmentCollateralLocked: These values cannot be changed after collateral has been locked or drawn.
parameters.commitmentPaused: Unpause the campaign before changing the product commitment.
parameters.commitmentStateDisabled: The product commitment cannot be changed while the campaign is {state}.

tokens.empty: No payment tokens whitelisted yet. Add one below so investors can buy.
tokens.noFeedOnChain: No feed configured for this chain
tokens.noOracleFeed: No Chainlink feed configured for {symbol} on this chain.

proceedsSplit.missingHint: Attach the approved module and choose a project partner receiver. The owner receives the remaining proceeds.
proceedsSplit.attachedHint: Primary-sale owner proceeds are routed by this split; protocol fees are unaffected.
proceedsSplit.implMissing: Proceeds split implementation not configured for this chain.
proceedsSplit.invalidAddress: Enter a valid non-zero Ethereum address.
proceedsSplit.invalidBps: Enter a percentage greater than 0 and up to 100.

directIssue.missingHint: Attach the approved module to mint campaign tokens for off-chain agreements.
directIssue.attachedHint: Mint campaign tokens directly without payment. Max cap and Funding/Active state are still enforced.
directIssue.implMissing: Direct issue implementation not configured for this chain.
directIssue.invalidRecipient: Enter a valid non-zero recipient address.
directIssue.invalidAmount: Enter an amount greater than zero.
directIssue.invalidState: Direct issue is available only during Funding or Active.
directIssue.exceedsMaxCap: This issue would exceed the campaign max cap.

projectUpdates.missingHint: Attach the approved module to publish on-chain project updates.
projectUpdates.attachedHint: Publish signed update evidence on-chain while keeping rich content in public metadata.
projectUpdates.titlePlaceholder: Harvest inspection, planting milestone, field report…
projectUpdates.bodyPlaceholder: Write the update for investors and holders.
projectUpdates.implMissing: Project updates implementation not configured for this chain.

repayment.missingHint: Attach the approved module to this campaign, then initialize its per-token bonus.
repayment.attachedHint: Fund the USDC pool and tune the bonus holders receive on top of principal.
repayment.implMissing: Repayment implementation not configured for this chain.
repayment.amountRequired: Enter an amount greater than zero.
repayment.withdrawTooHigh: Withdraw amount is higher than the pool balance.

debtRestructuring.missingHint: Attach the approved module so unpaid harvest USDC can become Campaign Tokens after the deposit deadline.
debtRestructuring.attachedHint: Holders will see Campaign Token conversion when an unpaid USDC shortfall becomes eligible.
debtRestructuring.operationalHint: Conversion opens only after the USDC deposit deadline, after claimable USDC has been withdrawn, and after any covered collateral is exhausted.
debtRestructuring.implMissing: Debt restructuring implementation not configured for this chain.

ecommerce.attachedHint: Catalog, SKUs, prices and repayment split are managed from this module.
ecommerce.missingHint: Attach the ecommerce module to sell products from this campaign.
ecommerce.skuHint: Use a readable key or an existing 0x SKU id already published in the catalog.
ecommerce.repaymentInactive: Repayment module is not active: allocation forced to 0%.
ecommerce.implMissing: Ecommerce implementation not configured for this chain.
ecommerce.skuRequired: Price and inventory must be greater than zero.
ecommerce.defaultProductDescription: Product reserved from the campaign shop.

manage.noObligations: No reported seasons yet. Run a season, end it, and report the harvest to see it here.
manage.reportedNoCommits: Harvest reported · no holder claims yet
manage.reportedNoCommitsHint: The season is reported and holders can redeem $YIELD. Nothing for you to deposit until someone commits.
manage.shortfallBanner: Deposit window closed with {amount} USDC still owed. Holders will receive pro-rata of what was deposited.
manage.feeNote: 2% protocol fee is deducted from each deposit. The "Use max" button pre-fills the exact gross needed to fully cover the holder pool.

sidebar.yieldHint: Dynamic rate: decreases as campaign fills

grow.title: $GROW
grow.subtitle: The protocol's utility token. Earn it by participating in any campaign, buy it directly with allowlisted stablecoins, stake it for a continuous USDC stream, or burn it to redeem a pro-rata basket of the Treasury.

stakingAllocation.title: Campaign tokens owned
stakingAllocation.subtitle: Direct Treasury balances plus active staked positions, grouped by campaign.
stakingAllocation.empty: No Treasury campaign token exposure is indexed yet.

curve.title: $GROW curve
curve.empty: Curve unavailable until floor and circulating supply are above zero.

buy.title: Buy $GROW
buy.blurb: Buy $GROW with USDC. Price and token validity are checked directly on-chain when the transaction runs.
buy.salePaused: Direct sale is currently paused by the multisig.
buy.depegged: {symbol} price unavailable. The transaction will validate it on-chain.
buy.notDeployed: $GROW contracts not yet deployed on this chain. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_GROW_TOKEN and NEXT_PUBLIC_GROW_TREASURY in .env.local.

stake.title: Stake $GROW
stake.blurb: Earn USDC, fed by Treasury harvest distributions. Multiplier ramps 1.0× → 2.0× over 365 days. Any withdraw resets the streak.
stake.rewardBalanceHint: This is the USDC counter that grows while Treasury rewards stream into the staking pool.
stake.withdrawWarning: Streak resets to 1.0× on any withdraw, even partial. Claim USDC first if you want the rewards earned at the current multiplier without resetting your streak.
stake.notDeployed: Staking pool not yet deployed. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_GROW_STAKING_POOL in .env.local.

admin.title: $GROW protocol controls
admin.subtitle: Owner-only operations — curate the tracked-campaign set, allocate Treasury funds, release the team reserve, pause the direct sale. Every write goes through the factory's onlyOwner forwarders.
admin.connectPrompt: Connect the multisig wallet to access the admin controls.
admin.notOwner: Read-only view — connected wallet is not the factory owner.
admin.ownerConfirmed: Connected as factory owner. All controls are unlocked.

auto.title: Auto-allocation
auto.blurb: When ON, every direct $GROW buy auto-spreads the freshly received USDC across all tracked Active campaigns. Manual allocations always work regardless.

track.title: Tracked campaigns
track.blurb: Curated by the multisig — only tracked campaigns receive Treasury allocations. Untrack stops new allocations but does not pull existing CT back.
track.empty: No campaigns tracked yet. Add a campaign address below to start.

alloc.title: Allocate funds
alloc.blurb: Spend the Treasury's stablecoin holdings to buy CampaignTokens. Manual sends to one campaign; batch spreads equally across all tracked Active campaigns.
alloc.note: Batch ignores the campaign field. Manual is gated on a valid campaign address; the campaign must accept the chosen stablecoin.

release.title: Release $GROW reserve
release.blurb: Move team-reserve $GROW out of the Treasury into circulation. Each release dilutes the floor proportionally to the increase in circulating supply.
release.invalidInput: Check inputs (valid recipient + amount within reserve)
release.warning: ⚠ Releases dilute the floor. Do this with intention (vesting, partner grant, ops payment) — not casually.

sale.title: Direct sale controls
sale.blurb: Emergency pause + markup adjustment for the direct $GROW buy path. Markup is the % above floor charged on every direct buy.
sale.markupHint: 0–50%. Changes apply to the next buy. Capped at 50% on-chain.

flywheel.title: How participation compounds
flywheel.subtitle: Every campaign buy feeds the Treasury. Every Treasury allocation grows the basket. Every harvest pays $GROW stakers. Every staker earnings push the floor up — and the loop runs again.
flywheel.footnote: No human in the middle: each step is automatic via on-chain hooks. The multisig only curates the tracked-campaigns list.

s1.title: Buy & earn $GROW
s1.body: Anyone funds a campaign with USDC. 3% goes to the FeeSplitter (30% Treasury / 70% ops). The buyer also earns free $GROW via the bonding curve — escrowed pre-softcap, minted directly post-activation.

s2.title: Treasury auto-allocates
s2.body: Direct $GROW buys send USDC straight into the Treasury, which auto-spreads it across tracked active campaigns. No multisig click needed.

s3.title: Harvest yield flows back
s3.body: Treasury holds CampaignTokens, stakes them, claims $YIELD, then redeems for USDC at harvest. The harvest USDC lands in the Treasury — backing per circulating $GROW grows.

s4.title: Stakers earn, floor pumps
s4.body: 80% of harvest USDC is forwarded to the $GROW staking pool. Multiplier ramps 1.0× → 2.0× over 365 days. Floor pumps from buybacks + harvest revenue → next buyer pays more for less $GROW.

escrow.title: Your $GROW escrow
escrow.blurb: $GROW you earned by buying into a campaign before its soft cap. Claimable once the campaign activates; voided if the campaign fails its funding round.
escrow.connectPrompt: Connect your wallet to view your escrow allocations.
escrow.empty: No $GROW escrow yet. Buy into any campaign and a free $GROW allocation will land here automatically.
escrow.notDeployed: Minter not yet deployed. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_GROW_MINTER in .env.local.

grower.noCampaigns: No campaigns from this grower yet.

wallet.title: Investments & staking
wallet.investmentsSubtitle: Campaign tokens bought by this wallet.
wallet.stakingSubtitle: Active campaign-token positions currently earning yield.
wallet.noInvestments: No campaign investments indexed for this wallet yet.
wallet.noStaking: No active staking positions for this wallet yet.

form.title: Your profile
form.name: Name
form.namePlaceholder: Your name or your farm's name
form.bioPlaceholder: A short introduction: who you are, what you do, your values…

social.inactive: Connect a public social profile to receive the onchain badge.

I'm verifying my grower profile on GrowFi with @higrowfi.
Regenerative finance starts with trusted growers.

{code}
https://growfi.dev
social.nonceUnavailable: On-chain nonce not loaded yet. Try again in a moment.
social.copyFailed: Unable to copy the post text. Select it manually and copy it.
social.verifierNotConfigured: The verifier accepted the proof but is not configured to sign on-chain attestations.

notifications.title: Receive notifications
notifications.description: Get an email when something happens on your campaigns or positions — new buys, season ends, harvests, USDC commitments. Off-chain only, never published to the blockchain.
notifications.emailPlaceholderOnFile: Enter a new email to replace the current one
notifications.emailOnFile: An email is already on file. Type a new one above to replace it.
notifications.frequencyHint: We send at most one digest every 10–15 minutes — never one email per event.

portfolio.title: My Portfolio
portfolio.connectWallet: Connect your wallet to see your positions, purchases and harvest claims.
portfolio.noPositions: You have no active staking positions yet.
portfolio.noPurchases: You haven't bought into any campaign yet.

positions.label: Positions
positions.hint: Your staked tokens earning $YIELD per season.

purchases.label: Purchases
purchases.hint: Every buy you've made across all campaigns.

claims.label: Harvest claims
claims.hint: USDC & product redemptions after each harvest.

hero.badge: Seed round open · GrowFi is raising now
hero.lead: GrowFi turns productive assets into transparent onchain campaigns.
hero.subtitle1: Fund real syntropic agroforestry harvests onchain:
examples: invest in shade coffee, harvest roasted beans
invest in orchard beehives, harvest honey
hero.subtitle2: — redeem physical product at harvest, or get your USDC back, locked in escrow until the soft cap is met.

how.intro: Each campaign keeps the important parts visible: who receives funds, what investors get, and how project updates are tracked.

steps.title: A project opens a campaign
steps.body: Project owner sets funding goal, accepted tokens (ETH/USDC/EURC), and paypack terms.

steps.title: Investors fund transparently
steps.body: Stablecoin purchases mint campaign tokens and route proceeds through the configured split.

steps.title: The project keeps reporting
steps.body: Updates are posted onchain, with offchain media and signed reactions for the community.

steps.title: The harvest becomes a claim
steps.body: At harvest, holders use $YIELD to claim product or receive their USDC share.

steps.title: Capital can recycle or exit
steps.body: Holders can restake into the next season or queue a sell-back. Incoming buyers fill exits first-in-first-out before new exposure is created.

ledger.title: Capital, harvests and $GROW move on separate rails.
ledger.body: Every rail has one job. USDC funds and settles. $CAMPAIGN tracks a position in one harvest. $YIELD is the claim ticket. $GROW captures the protocol-wide treasury loop.

usdc.label: USDC
usdc.body: Funds campaigns, refunds missed soft caps, and settles buyback windows.

campaign.label: $CAMP
campaign.body: Represents a funded position in one specific harvest campaign.

yield.label: $YIELD
yield.body: Accrues while staked and becomes the claim for product or USDC.

grow.label: $GROW
grow.body: Links campaign revenue, treasury backing and staker rewards.

grow.title: The protocol token sits above individual harvests.
grow.body: Campaign fees, direct $GROW buys and harvest settlement all feed one treasury loop. $GROW gives the protocol a way to route capital into active campaigns and route revenue back to long-term stakers.

treasury.label: Treasury
treasury.body: Direct buys fund the protocol treasury with USDC.

staking.label: Staking
staking.body: Harvest revenue can be forwarded to $GROW stakers with a time-weighted multiplier.

floor.label: Floor
floor.body: Backing is calculated against circulating $GROW, excluding treasury-held reserve.

campaigns.intro: Every campaign here tokenises a real productive project. You fund with accepted tokens, earn campaign-specific exposure, and follow transparent terms from funding to settlement.
campaigns.createTitle: Have a real project to fund?
campaigns.createBody: Launch a campaign for your next production cycle or revenue project. Share clear terms, route proceeds onchain, and open it to aligned investors.

trust.intro: Open-source code, public contracts, and a mainnet-first settlement path. If a campaign does not deliver, the protocol opens a 90-day USDC buyback window: the grower deposits, or holders claim pro-rata.

items.label: Verified contracts
items.detail: Ethereum mainnet is the long-term settlement target because it is the most battle-tested neutral base layer for assets that must remain verifiable for years.

items.label: Oracle
items.detail: Every price feed validated: non-negative, updated within 1 hour, decimals capped at 18. No oracle manipulation surface.

items.label: Silvi Protocol
items.detail: Satellite monitoring + ground-truth verification. Growers can plug in Silvi Protocol to raise campaign trust — public, subgraph-indexed.

items.label: Escrow
items.detail: Funds sit in the Campaign contract until the soft cap is reached. If the deadline passes under-funded, investors burn their campaign tokens and withdraw the exact USDC they paid.

feeTable.title: Each flow has its own percentage.

campaignBuy.route: Sent to the FeeSplitter; the campaign receives the net 97%.

harvestDeposit.route: 2% to the FeeSplitter, 98% to the holder pool.

repayment.route: Deducted from gross payout before the holder receives the net.

ecommerce.route: Global protocol setting from the factory; producers cannot change it.

trust.escrowBody: Funds sit in the Campaign contract until the soft cap is reached. If the deadline passes under-funded, any wallet can trigger buyback — every investor burns their $CAMPAIGN and withdraws the exact USDC they paid in. Zero discretion, one block, no DAO vote.

partners.intro: GrowFi is the onchain rail. Harvest credibility comes from the DAOs and protocols monitoring the ground and verifying the practice.
partners.rifaiRole: Host DAO · registered cultural association in Italy. Steward of Sicilian growers and the first live campaign.
partners.silviRole: Silvi Protocol partner · satellite monitoring and ground-truth verification for planted trees and harvests. Pluggable into any campaign.

invite.intro: Browsing and funding harvests is open to everyone. To tokenize your own harvest and launch a campaign, we're onboarding a small group of growers — connect the wallet you want to use, then leave your email + Telegram and we'll reach out when it's your turn.
invite.bannerConnect: Creating a campaign needs an invite. Connect your wallet to request one.
invite.bannerNeeded: Creating a campaign needs an invite. Fill in the details below.
invite.bannerPending: Your request is under review. We'll email you the moment it's approved.
invite.bannerRejected: Your grower request wasn't approved. Reach out if you think it's a mistake.
invite.connectBody: We use this address as your grower identity. If we've already approved it, you can create campaigns right away.
invite.requestBody: Drop your email and Telegram — we'll email you when it's your turn.
invite.telegramHint: Telegram username (e.g. @growfi). Leave empty if you don't have one — we'll reach out by email.
invite.requestOk: Thanks. We'll email you back as soon as it's your turn.
invite.pendingBody: We're looking at your grower request. In the meantime you can already browse and fund any open campaign.
invite.rejectedBody: We can't approve you as a grower right now. Browsing and funding campaigns is still open. Reach out if you think it's a mistake.
invite.activeBody: Your wallet is approved as a grower. Tokenize your next harvest and open your campaign.

faq.title: Protocol facts, fees and project flow.
faq.intro: Short answers for the public app: how campaign funds move, what happens at soft cap, where updates live, and which fees apply.

participate.title: How do I participate?
participate.body: You can fund active campaigns directly with accepted tokens such as ETH, USDC or EURC, or buy $GROW for broader protocol exposure across multiple campaigns.

campaignFunds.title: Where do campaign funds go?
campaignFunds.body: Primary-sale proceeds go through the campaign contract. Protocol fees are routed to the FeeSplitter; net campaign proceeds follow the configured owner or split receiver route.

softCap.title: What happens if a campaign misses soft cap?
softCap.body: Funds remain claimable through the refund path. Investors burn the proportional campaign tokens and recover the payment amount from the contract.

yieldToken.title: What is the Yield Token?
yieldToken.body: $YIELD is the campaign-specific harvest claim token. It accrues while a position is staked and is used at harvest to claim physical product or the campaign's USDC settlement.

growToken.title: What is the $GROW token?
growToken.body: $GROW is the protocol token. Its treasury can allocate stablecoin capital across multiple active campaigns, spreading exposure instead of relying on a single harvest. This can reduce concentration risk, but it does not remove campaign, liquidity or market risk.

projectUpdates.title: Are project updates onchain?
projectUpdates.body: The update evidence is posted onchain. Rich text and images live in public metadata, and the campaign page plus feed show the indexed update.

split.title: Can project proceeds be split?
split.body: Yes. Campaign owners can configure a project partner receiver and percentage, while the owner receives the remaining net proceeds.

silvi.title: What is Silvi Protocol?
silvi.body: Silvi Protocol is an optional project evidence layer for campaigns that have public monitoring data. When configured, GrowFi links the campaign to the Silvi project view.

notFound.title: Nothing grew here.
notFound.body: This patch of land is empty — the page you were looking for moved to another field.
notFound.aside: Even the best growers leave a few rows fallow.

hero.title: GrowFi is building the capital market for real harvests.
hero.body: The protocol is live on Ethereum mainnet: campaign creation, USDC funding, $GROW treasury automation, staking, producer verification and harvest settlement now run on production contracts, not test rails.
hero.bodyTestnet: The test platform runs the same GrowFi feature set on Ethereum Sepolia: campaign creation, USDC-style funding, $GROW treasury automation, staking, producer verification and harvest settlement against testnet contracts.

protocol.hint: Chain 1 contracts, live subgraph and real USDC settlement are active.
protocol.hintTestnet: Chain 11155111 contracts, Sepolia subgraph and testnet settlement rails are active.

thesis.title: Agricultural working capital is still offline. GrowFi makes real productive assets investable onchain.

items.market: Small and medium growers need seasonal capital before harvest, while investors need transparent exposure to real productive assets.
items.protocol: GrowFi converts each harvest into an auditable onchain campaign with USDC escrow, refunds, staking yield, repayment modules and harvest settlement.
items.distribution: The first wedge is Sicily: high-value crops, strong territorial brands and a producer network that can launch production campaigns one by one.

fees.title: The fee schedule is explicit per flow.
fees.body: GrowFi does not have one generic 2% fee. Primary campaign buys, harvest settlement, repayment and ecommerce are separate flows with separate mechanics.

campaignBuy.route: Sent to the FeeSplitter; the campaign receives the net 97%.

harvestDeposit.route: 2% to the FeeSplitter, 98% to the holder pool.

repayment.route: Deducted from gross payout before the holder receives the net.

ecommerce.route: Global protocol setting from the factory; producers cannot change it.

milestones.title: The investor story is now a production mainnet rollout.
milestones.titleTestnet: The investor story can be tested end-to-end on Sepolia.

product.title: Mainnet protocol is live
product.body: Campaign factory, modules, $GROW treasury, staking and harvest accounting are deployed on Ethereum mainnet.
product.bodyTestnet: Campaign factory, modules, $GROW treasury, staking and harvest accounting are deployed on Ethereum Sepolia.

supply.title: First production campaign is running
supply.body: Campaign activity is indexed from ugraph and new producers can launch through the production app.
supply.bodyTestnet: Sepolia campaign activity is indexed from ugraph and new producers can test-launch through the testnet app.

seed.title: The round expands real supply
seed.body: Capital goes into audits, compliance, producer onboarding, liquidity operations and a deeper pipeline of mainnet campaigns.
seed.bodyTestnet: The testnet validates campaign, staking, treasury and settlement flows before production changes.

form.title: Request the deck and mainnet walkthrough.
form.titleTestnet: Request the deck and Sepolia walkthrough.
form.body: Tell us who you are and what you want to review. We will share the current materials, live contract context and campaign pipeline.
form.name: Name
form.success: Request received. We will get back to you shortly.
form.error: Unable to send the request right now.

mainnet.title: We are building where long-term settlement is hardest to compromise.
mainnet.titleTestnet: We test the full protocol on Ethereum's L1 testnet.
mainnet.body: GrowFi is already live on Ethereum L1 because agricultural finance is slow-cycle finance. A harvest, a buyback window and a producer relationship need infrastructure that can outlive market narratives.
mainnet.bodyTestnet: GrowFi testnet runs on Ethereum Sepolia so campaigns, staking, treasury allocation and settlement can be rehearsed against the same L1 assumptions before production.

items.security: Ethereum L1 is the most battle-tested settlement layer for assets that must remain verifiable over years, not weeks.
items.securityTestnet: Sepolia keeps the test surface aligned with the Ethereum L1 production target.
items.settlement: Harvest claims, refunds and treasury reserves need strong finality and native liquidity more than cheap execution alone.
items.settlementTestnet: The same wallet, RPC, explorer and contract assumptions can be tested before production execution.
items.credibility: For growers, investors and institutional partners, Ethereum mainnet makes custody, audits and due diligence easier to verify.
items.credibilityTestnet: For operators and producers, Sepolia makes end-to-end QA possible without touching production funds.

grow.title: $GROW turns campaign activity into a protocol-level flywheel.
grow.body: GrowFi is not only a marketplace for individual harvests. $GROW is the treasury and staking layer that lets protocol revenue, campaign allocation and long-term participation reinforce each other.

treasury.label: Backed treasury
treasury.body: Direct buys add stablecoin reserves while campaign exposure grows through treasury allocations.

staking.label: Staker rewards
staking.body: Harvest settlement can route USDC to long-term $GROW stakers through the reward pool.

allocation.label: Campaign demand
allocation.body: $GROW treasury automation can distribute fresh capital across tracked active campaigns.
